blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
